name: codex-homunculus
description: Local-first Homunculus-style memory, instinct validation, and evolution for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Validated local instinct memory for Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex Homunculus adapts Homunculus-style session memory into a Codex-native plugin with project-local state, Markdown instincts, sensitive-data guardrails, import/export, validation, deterministic evolution summaries, and opt-in AGENTS.md bootstrap instructions. It does not depend on Claude Code hooks.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Homunculus to start this repo.
Apply learned instincts before changing this code.
Save this workflow lesson as an instinct.
